data.name: Thomas
data.flavor_text:
"I've never seen a winter so beautiful! Look at the
snow—pristine as far as the eye can see!"

data.name: Lilo

abilities.name: Creative Inspiration
abilities.text: While you have a character named Stitch in play, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"A snow Stitch is like a snowman, but even
hungrier."

data.name: Pudge

abilities.name: Good Friend
abilities.text: If you have a character named Lilo in play, you can play this character for free.

data.flavor_text:
"How many sandwiches will I need to feed you to
make all this snow melt?"
—Lilo

data.name: Pumbaa

abilities.name: Shake Things Up
abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

data.flavor_text:
"See? I told ya he was hardheaded!"
—Timon

data.name: Tiana

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "This cocoa will warm you up like a hug from your mama."

data.name: Nakoma
data.flavor_text:
"Come sit by the fire. It will keep you warm until
this storm blows over."

data.name: Stitch

abilities.name: Bring Your Friends
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other characters in play, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"First one down the mountain gets all the
marshmallows for their cocoa!"
—Lilo

data.name: Pocahontas

abilities.name: Discovery Awaits
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"If you don't know the way, the spirits will show you."
—Pocahontas

data.name: David

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text:
"These snowboards are pretty sweet—and they
make great shields!"

data.name: Fangmeyer

abilities.name: Request Reinforcements
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return a Detective character card from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text:
"Failure to signal, broken tail light, and taunting
an officer with hot chocolate. That's gonna be a
hefty fine."

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Stands His Ground
abilities.text: This character can't challenge.

data.name: Sarabi

abilities.name: Fearsome Snarl
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen opposing character gets -4 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text:
A loving mother, a cunning hunter, and a fierce
warrior.

data.name: Grandmother Willow

abilities.name: Smooth the Way
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

data.flavor_text: "I haven't had this much excitement in 200 years."

data.name: Cobra Bubbles

abilities.name: Aura of Authority
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able.

data.flavor_text: "No, it can't wait until this storm blows over!"

data.name: John Smith

abilities.name: Follow the Tracks
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted and none of your characters challenged this turn, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Interesting. These animal tracks lead away from
the vine. But toward what?"

data.name: Timon

abilities.name: Get Rid of That
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a non-character card of your choice.

data.flavor_text: "Okay, Pumbaa—hit it!"

keywords.name: Shift 4 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lilo.)

abilities.name: I'll Count You In
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may play a character with cost 2 or less from your discard for free.

data.name: Pleakley

abilities.name: Signs of Life
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have another Alien character in play, draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"Amazing! This storm has created all sorts of new
life forms. I will call you ‘Avis frigida.’"

abilities.name: Welcoming Crowd
abilities.text: For each character you have in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

abilities.name: I Am Helping
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may remove all damage from chosen character.

abilities.name: That's Your Cue
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character card with cost 2 or less and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Reuben

abilities.name: Lunch Special
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character of yours. For each 1 damage removed this way, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"At least I'll be ready in case of a sandwich
shortage."

keywords.name: Shift 3 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Pocahontas.)

abilities.name: Calming Words
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her and none of your characters challenged this turn, characters can't challenge until the start of your next turn.

data.name: Simba

abilities.name: You Don't Stand a Chance
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text: Like Zazu always says, practice makes perfect!

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Come See!
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character exerts, reveal a number of cards from the top of your deck equal to the number of cards under him. Put all revealed character cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

keywords.name: Singer 3
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 3 to sing songs.)

abilities.name: Underdog
abilities.text: If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

data.name: Widow Tweed

abilities.name: I've Got You
abilities.text: When you play this character, return a character card from your discard to your hand. If that character is named Tod, you may play him for free.

data.flavor_text: "No, I just can't leave you out here all alone."

data.name: Percy

abilities.name: Ice Bath
abilities.text: This character can't challenge.

data.flavor_text:
"That's the strangest creature I've ever seen."
—Grandmother Willow

data.name: Raging Storm
rules: Banish all characters.
data.flavor_text:
"The storm...it's too much, Lilo. We have to go back!"
—Nani

data.name: Akood et Emuti
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
You pay 2 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
Alan ot agan, atoom on ataki
Oteem-ich atooca

data.name: Mother Will Protect You
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character can't be challenged until the start of your next turn.

data.name: Wisdom of the Willow
rules: For the rest of this turn, whenever one of your characters quests, you may draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Ripples are so small at first, then look how they grow.
But someone has to start them."
—Grandmother Willow

data.name: Ohana Means Family
rules: Remove all damage from chosen character of yours. Draw a card for each 1 damage removed this way.
data.flavor_text:
"Family means nobody is left behind."
—Lilo

abilities.name: Spinning Arrow
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if a character of yours challenged this turn, banish this item.

abilities.name: Your Path
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if none of your characters challenged this turn, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a character card with cost 3 or less or named Pocahontas, you may put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

data.name: Zootopia
data.flavor_text:
"Welcome to Tundratown. Please respect our hibernating inhabitants and keep
noise to a minimum."
—Zootopia Chamber of Commerce

data.name: Nala

abilities.name: Playful Slide
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.flavor_text: "Told ya I'd make it to the bottom first, Simba!"

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Mystical Insight
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, put all cards from under her into your hand.

data.name: Tigger

abilities.name: Splenderiffic Bounce
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return chosen character, item, or location with cost 2 or less to their player's hand.

data.flavor_text:
"What do you mean, can Tiggers bounce in the
snow? Just watch!"

data.name: Isis Vanderchill

abilities.name: Chill Out
abilities.text: When you play this character, exert chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
Darkwing: "Just cool it, lady."
Launchpad: "I think you might want to rephrase
that, DW."

abilities.name: Look Out!
abilities.text: When you play this character, move up to 1 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.name: Morgana Macawber
data.flavor_text:
"Sometimes I don't even know whose side you're on,"
Darkwing said.
"The same side I've always been on," Morgana replied.
"Mine."

data.name: Rabbit

keywords.name: Challenger +3
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +3 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text:
"Not another step. I've got a shovel full of snow,
and I'm not afraid to use it!"

data.name: Pocahontas

abilities.name: What Is My Path?
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, gain lore equal to another chosen exerted character's {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"She has her mother's spirit. She goes wherever
the wind takes her."
—Kekata

data.name: Darkwing Duck

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.flavor_text:
"I am the terrier that yaps in the night. I am
the schnauzer that digs up your petunias. I am
Darkwolf Dog!"

data.name: Anna

abilities.name: Unexpected Discovery
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put a card from chosen player's discard on the bottom of their deck.

data.flavor_text:
Even in the deep forest, Anna could see the vine
poking above the treetops.

data.flavor_text: "GO AWAY!!"

data.flavor_text:
"The cows are not what they seem."
—Launchpad

The air was crisp and clear. "A perfect morning for
a snowball fight," said Christopher Robin.

What are you willing to give up in exchange for
power?

data.name: Do You Want To Build A Snowman?
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

Chosen opponent chooses YES! or NO!:
• YES! You gain 3 lore.
• NO! They choose a character of theirs and put that
card on the bottom of their deck.

data.name: Come Out and Fight!
rules: Put all cards from under chosen character, item, or location on the bottom of their player's deck in a random order. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
Mickey: "All right, let's get that ghost!"
Goofy: "How do you reckon we do that?"

data.name: Swordplay
rules: Chosen character gains Challenger +3 this turn. (They get +3 {Strength} while challenging.)
data.flavor_text:
"It takes a great hero to handle a sword like this!"
—Taran

data.name: Colors of the Wind
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Each player reveals the top card of their deck. Draw a card for each different ink type of cards revealed this way.

data.name: Mother's Necklace

abilities.name: Precious Gift
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if none of your characters challenged this turn, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.flavor_text:
"It's more than a necklace—it's a connection to her past."
—Chief Powhatan

data.name: Mystical Inkcaster

abilities.name: Special Summons
abilities.text: {Exert} — Play a character with cost 5 or less for free. They gain Rush. At the end of your turn, banish them. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.flavor_text:
"We need your help. Show us what you've got."
—Shanzay, an Illumineer

data.name: Pot of Honey

data.flavor_text: "Oh, bother. Not again...again."

abilities.text: When this location is banished, if there was an exerted character here, return this card from your discard to your hand.

abilities.name: Rigorous Training
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, gain lore equal to her {Strength}, to a maximum of 6 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Now remember, it's your first day of training, so listen
to your teacher and no fightin', play nice with the other
kids..."
—Mushu

abilities.name: I Dare You!

data.flavor_text: "Hi."

data.name: Big Mama

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
"Gather 'round, little ones. Let Big Mama teach
you how to stay warm in the snow!"

data.name: Minnie Mouse
data.flavor_text:
She's the epitome of grace, beauty, and a whole
lot of fun.

data.name: Yao

abilities.name: Ooh, I'm Scared
abilities.text: During opponents' turns, this character gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

data.flavor_text:
In his mind, he was "Snow-General Yao," surveying
his frozen lands from atop his icy fortress.

data.name: Chien-Po
data.flavor_text:
"Stay right here, little snowball. I'll come get you
when it's time for your date with Ling's face."

data.name: Ling

abilities.name: Building Muscles
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"If I keep carrying these, I'll be as strong as
Chien-Po!"

data.name: Boomer

abilities.name: Spotted Him!
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may exert chosen damaged character.

data.flavor_text:
"Good work, Boomer. We'll get him this time."
—Dinky

abilities.text: When you play this character, you may shuffle chosen opposing character into their player's deck. If you do, that player may play a character from their discard for free.

abilities.name: Get Him!
abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent chooses one of their characters and deals 1 damage to them.

data.flavor_text: "Nail him, Boomer! Sock it to him!"

data.name: Strike a Good Match

Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.
data.flavor_text:
Please bring honor to us
Please bring honor to us all

data.name: Snowball Fight
rules: Each opponent chooses and discards a card. If you have a character with Evasive in play, gain 1 lore.
data.flavor_text:
"Snowflakes compacted into sphere makes for excellent
projectile."
—Jumba Jookiba

data.name: Freeze the Vine
rules: Banish all locations. Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.
data.flavor_text:
"There's only one way to stop this vine. Wait, no...
It's full of mixed ink? There's too much! I can't control it!"

data.name: Education or Elimination
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

Choose one:
• Draw a card. Chosen character of yours gets +1 {Lore} and gains
Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters
with Evasive can challenge them.)
• Banish chosen damaged character.

keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
"Oh, dear. Look at the ice! Do you think this
means...?"

data.name: Agnarr

abilities.name: Protective Instinct
abilities.text: While you have a Queen character in play, this character gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text: "It's just as we feared."

data.name: Negaduck
data.flavor_text:
"Only someone so dastardly, so despicable, so
disdainful of the utterly defenseless would dare
perform such a deed!"
—Darkwing Duck

keywords.name: Shift 3 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Negaduck.)

abilities.name: Sticky Fingers
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges another character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Superhuman Strength
abilities.text: While there's a card under this character, he gets +3 {Strength}.

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Dynamic Maneuver
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges, if he's at a location, he takes no damage from the challenge.

data.name: Slushy

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
"All right, Slushy. Do your stuff."
—Lilo

data.name: Goofy

abilities.name: Prepare Yourself
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may ready chosen character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Tonight, you will be visited by three spirits. Listen
to 'em."

data.name: Goofy

abilities.name: Yaaaaaaa-hoo-hoo-hoo-hooey
abilities.text: {Exert} — Banish chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"Skiing really is quite simple, once you get the
hang of it."
—Narrator

abilities.name: About Time!
abilities.text: For each action card in your discard, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

abilities.name: Chaotic Collision
abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent loses 2 lore.

keywords.name: Shift 4 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Elsa.)

abilities.name: Endless Winter
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever you play a location, you may exert chosen character with 3 {Strength} or less.

abilities.name: Distant Call
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, she gets +3 {Lore}.

abilities.name: Payment Due
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, each opponent loses 1 lore. Draw a card for each 1 lore lost this way.

abilities.name: Foreclosure
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if an opponent has 0 lore, you gain 1 lore.

data.name: Elsa

abilities.name: Clear the Way
abilities.text: When you play this character, you pay 2 {Ink} less for the next location you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"The vine is worse than I thought. I'll have to take
care of this myself."

keywords.name: Boost 3 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 3 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: The Food of Generosity
abilities.text: This character can't quest or challenge unless you put a card under him this turn.

data.name: Nani's Payback
rules: Each opponent loses lore equal to the damage on chosen character of yours, to a maximum of 4 lore each. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Older sister's wrath is even more dangerous than
Hamsterviel."
—Jumba Jookiba

data.name: Force of a Great Typhoon
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gets +5 {Strength} this turn.
data.flavor_text:
Once you find your center
You are sure to win

data.name: Marching Off to Battle
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
If a character was banished this turn, draw 2 cards.

data.name: The Cold Never Bothered Me
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a location card and put it into your hand. Put the rest into your discard. You pay 3 {Ink} less for the next location you play this turn.

data.name: Grab Your Bow
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Banish up to 2 chosen characters with 2 {Strength} or less.

data.name: Lonely Grave

abilities.name: Haunting Presence
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.

data.flavor_text: A frightening prospect for the richest man in town.

data.name: Kristoff's Lute

abilities.name: Moment of Inspiration
abilities.text: {Exert} — Reveal the top card of your deck. You may play it as if it were in your hand. Otherwise, put it in your discard.

data.flavor_text:
"A little music and a campfire is the best way to keep
warm in winter...well, mostly the campfire."
—Kristoff

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this location.)

abilities.name: Good Business
abilities.text: This location gets +1 ⛉ and +1 {Lore} for each card under it.

abilities.name: New Arrival
abilities.text: Whenever you move a character here, put the top card of your deck under this location facedown.

abilities.name: Another Chance
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, you may put all cards from under this location into your hand. If you do, banish this location.

data.name: Beast's Castle

abilities.name: Snowball Standoff
abilities.text: Whenever a character here challenges another character, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text: While the flowers slept, something else began to bloom.

data.name: Roo

abilities.name: Hopping In
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put this character facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.

data.flavor_text:
"Look, Mama—the icy magic is going away! Aren't
the flowers pretty?"

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Extra Help
abilities.text: While there's a card under this character, she gets +1 {Lore}.

data.name: Piglet
data.flavor_text:
"I've always thought," said Pooh, "that sometimes
the smallest things are the best."

data.name: Mickey Mouse
data.flavor_text:
Tiny Tim loves seeing the Christmas decorations at
the Winter Festival. His father, Bob Cratchit, loves
every chance to spend time with him.

data.name: Minnie Mouse

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
She's always ready with a warm plate and a warm
heart.

data.name: Sina

keywords.name: Alert
keywords.text: (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
Sometimes, people just need to know there's
someone watching over them.

data.name: Honker Muddlefoot

abilities.name: Be Careful!
abilities.text: Your characters named Darkwing Duck gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
"It's clear you're the brains of this operation, Honker."
—Darkwing Duck

data.name: Daisy Duck
data.flavor_text:
"You loved your gold more than that precious
creature. And you lost her forever."
—Ghost of Christmas Past, to Scrooge

data.name: Darkwing Duck

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
"The noble visage of one of history's greatest
detectives, carved by one of history's other
greatest detectives: me."

keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.text: Whenever you put a card under this character, you may put a card from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Piglet.)

abilities.name: Special Recipe
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, remove up to 2 damage from each of your characters.

abilities.name: Ancestors' Gift
abilities.text: For each card in your inkwell, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

data.flavor_text: "Ice fishing? No, no—this is ice feeding!"

abilities.name: Keen Gear
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal an item card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Darkwing Duck

abilities.name: Modern Marvel
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may put an item card from your discard on the bottom of your deck. If you do, you may play an item with cost 5 or less from your discard for free.

data.flavor_text:
"I've got things in here that haven't even been tested
yet!"

data.name: Winnie the Pooh

abilities.name: Looking For a Morsel
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return an item card from your discard to your hand.

data.flavor_text: "Oh, bother! Empty again!"

keywords.name: Shift 4 {Ink}
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Scrooge McDuck.)

abilities.name: Spreading Joy
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put a card from the top of your deck facedown under each of your other characters. If you do, those characters gain Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Underdog
abilities.text: If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

keywords.name: Boost 1 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.name: Foreboding Glance
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, look at a number of cards from the top of your deck equal to the number of cards under him. Put one into your hand and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Moana

abilities.name: Ancestral Legacy
abilities.text: You can ink cards from your discard.

data.flavor_text:
"I've never seen anything like this before! It's so
dazzling, so beautiful. So...cold."

keywords.name: Boost 2 {Ink}
keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever you put a card under one of your other characters, put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.

abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Lore} for each card under him.

data.name: Belle

abilities.name: Winter Stockpile
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters is banished, you may put that card from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
What the Beast didn't know was that her father
had taught her how to throw a perfect snowball.

abilities.name: Hard Work
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, put the top card of your deck facedown under him.

abilities.name: A Giving Heart
abilities.text: When this character is banished in a challenge, you may put all cards that were under him under another chosen character or location of yours.

data.name: Scrooge McDuck

abilities.name: Bah, Humbug
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, chosen character gets -1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"You work all your life to get money, and people
want you to give it away."

data.name: Chief Tui

abilities.name: And Then...
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text: "And still a spark of hope burned in their hearts..."

data.name: Visiting Christmas Past
rules: Put any number of cards from under your characters and locations into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
data.flavor_text:
"What's wrong, Scrooge? I thought you enjoyed looking
down on the world!"
—The Ghost of Christmas Past

data.name: Let It Go
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Put chosen character into their player's inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Distract
rules: Chosen character gets -2 {Strength} this turn. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Be off with you, spirits! Can't a man enjoy his meal in
peace?"

data.name: Wipe Out!
rules: Put chosen character with Bodyguard or item into their player's inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.text: If you have a character named Darkwing Duck in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this item.

abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
"We all need a little help from time to time."
—Mrs. Cratchit

abilities.name: Secret Entrance
abilities.text: When you play this item, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character. If a character named Darkwing Duck is chosen, remove up to 4 damage instead.

abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets -1 {Strength} this turn. If you have a character named Darkwing Duck in play, chosen character gets -2 {Strength} this turn instead.

abilities.name: Almost Ready
abilities.text: This item enters play exerted.

abilities.name: Snap!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Choose one: • Banish chosen item. • Chosen opposing character gets -2 {Strength} this turn.

keywords.text: (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)

data.name: Launchpad

abilities.name: Stand Guard
abilities.text: Your locations gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
"No one'll crash the gate while I'm here. And I
know about crashing!"

data.name: Prince Naveen
data.flavor_text:
"Achidanza! I've never been this cold in my life.
It's so...invigorating!"

data.name: Darkwing Duck
data.flavor_text:
"I am the terror that flaps in the night! I am the
chill that runs up your spine! I am Darkwing Duck."

data.name: Li Shang

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text:
"My father was strict and stern, but he made me
who I am."

abilities.name: Easy Target
abilities.text: When you play this character, choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text: "I'd better be getting paid for this."

data.name: Launchpad

abilities.name: What Did You Need?
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw a card. Then, choose and discard a card unless you have a character named Darkwing Duck in play.

data.flavor_text:

an out-of-body experience."
—Darkwing Duck

data.flavor_text: "Where are the brakes on this doggone thing?!"

keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

"If this storm keeps up, every neighborhood will be
like Tundratown."

data.name: Duke Weaselton

data.flavor_text: "What'd you go and do that for?"

keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Li Shang.)

data.flavor_text:
"The best way I can honor my father's memory is
to finish his fight."

data.flavor_text:
"For a warming winter tea, add the following
Lorcana spices to your cup: frosted peppercorns,
silver cardamom, wishing star anise."
—Hana's Herborium

—Lilo

data.flavor_text:
"My big dumb sister said I had to wear warm
clothes, so I took ALL of them."

data.name: Keep the Ancient Ways
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Opponents can't play actions or items until the start of your next turn.

data.name: The Terror That Flaps in the Night
rules: Deal 2 damage to chosen opposing character. If you have a character named Darkwing Duck in play, deal 3 damage instead.
data.flavor_text:
"The first rule of superheroing is always utilize the
element of surprise."
—Darkwing Duck

data.name: Let's Get Dangerous
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

Each player shuffles their deck and then reveals the top card. Each player who reveals a character card may play that character for free. Otherwise, put the revealed cards on the bottom of their player's deck.

data.name: Winterspell
rules: Chosen location of yours can't be challenged until the start of your next turn. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Well, that backfired. Anyone know how to thaw an
Illuminary?"
—Shanzay, an Illumineer

data.name: Nearly Indestructible
rules: Chosen character of yours gains Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
data.flavor_text:
"I designed this creature for to be unstoppable."
—Jumba Jookiba

rules: Remove all damage from chosen character of yours. Draw a card for each 1 damage removed this way.

data.name: Raging Storm
rules: Banish all characters.

abilities.name: Thanks For Noticin' Me
abilities.text: For each exerted character in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

abilities.name: Sorry About That
abilities.text: When you play this character, for each opposing player, you may choose a character of theirs. They can't ready at the start of their next turn.

abilities.name: Unusual Transformation
abilities.text: If a card left a player's discard this turn, this character gains Shift 0 {Ink}.

abilities.name: Warm Heart
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may gain lore equal to the {Lore} of a character card in your discard. If you do, put that card on the bottom of your deck.

data.name: Colors of the Wind
rules: Each player reveals the top card of their deck. Draw a card for each different ink symbol on cards revealed this way.

abilities.name: Rigorous Training
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, gain lore equal to her {Strength}, to a maximum of 6 lore.

abilities.name: Impressive Leaps
abilities.text: Twice during your turn, whenever this character is chosen for an action or an item's ability, you may ready him.

data.name: Freeze the Vine
rules: Banish all locations. Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.

abilities.name: Sticky Fingers
abilities.text: Whenever this character challenges another character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

abilities.name: Endless Winter
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever you play a location, you may exert chosen character with 3 {Strength} or less.

abilities.name: Distant Call
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, she gets +3 {Lore}.

data.name: The Cold Never Bothered Me
rules: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a location card and put it into your hand. Put the rest into your discard. You pay 3 {Ink} less for the next location you play this turn.

abilities.name: Spreading Joy
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put a card from the top of your deck facedown under each of your other characters. If you do, those characters gain Ward until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Winter Stockpile
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters is banished, you may put that card from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.name: Anything That Glitters
abilities.text: Whenever you put a card under one of your characters or locations, this character gets +1 {Lore} this turn.

abilities.name: Untouchable
abilities.text: While you have no cards in your hand, this character gains Resist +2.

abilities.name: Good Aim
abilities.text: {Exert} — Once during your turn, you may choose and discard a card to deal 2 damage to chosen character.

abilities.name: Take That!
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever an item is banished, you may pay 1 {Ink} to deal 2 damage to chosen character.

abilities.name: Evildoers Beware!
abilities.text: This character can challenge ready Villain characters.

data.name: Let's Get Dangerous
rules: Each player shuffles their deck and then reveals the top card. Each player who reveals a character card may play that character for free. Otherwise, put the revealed cards on the bottom of their player's deck.

abilities.name: Calming Words
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her and none of your characters challenged this turn, characters can't challenge until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Ancestral Legacy
abilities.text: You can ink cards from your discard.
